hints.question: How do I work out where to plant each flower?
hints.answer:
First work out the gap between flowers:

```javascript
100 / (numberOfFlowers + 1)
```

The first flower goes at that position, and each next flower is one more gap along. So if there are 3 flowers the gap is 25, and they go at 25, 50 and 75.

hints.question: How do I see the different scenarios
hints.answer: Click on the circles on the left hand side in between your code and the results.
